nodes.label: Explicit Batch Tokens Design
nodes.summary: Design adding deterministic public batch_id values to candidates and optional batch_id on evaluation records for asynchronous partial tell semantics.

nodes.label: Batch ledger
nodes.summary: Internal ledger keyed by batch_id storing candidate order, records, consumed state, and engine-specific payloads.

edges.rationale: The batch-token design defines a private batch ledger keyed by batch_id.
Both designs make batch_id part of evaluation-record validation.
